dashboard.privacyNotice: 🔐 Recording was processed and permanently deleted for privacy
dashboard.subtitle: Recent advisory sessions and extracted insights
dashboard.recordSubtitle: Enter client email or assign after analysis
dashboard.unassignedDesc: No client selected — can be assigned after processing
dashboard.noSessionsFirstTimeDesc: Record your first advisory session using the microphone above. The AI will extract a summary and action items automatically.
dashboard.chatEmptyDesc: For example: "What did we discuss about mortgage rates last month?"
dashboard.deleteSessionDesc: This will permanently delete the session and all its tasks. This action cannot be undone.

tasks.title: Open Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Task Center — all sessions with pending actions
tasks.noActiveSessions: No sessions with open tasks right now.

record.title: Record Meeting
record.privacyNote: Privacy protected · Processed in memory. Not saved to disk.
record.tooShort: Recording too short. Record at least 2 seconds.
record.idle: Enter the client's email, then start recording.

analytics.subtitle: Session frequency and task completion metrics
analytics.talkTimeDesc: Advisor vs. Client speaking ratio per session
analytics.tasksCompletedDesc: {{completed}} of {{total}} tasks completed across all sessions

features.pageSubtitle: All platform capabilities in one place

aiSummary.title: AI Auto-Summary
aiSummary.desc: The AI agent analyzes the recording and automatically extracts a detailed summary and action items at the end of every session.

aiActionItems.title: Action Item Extraction
aiActionItems.desc: AI identifies and classifies tasks, decisions, and key points from the conversation and creates a structured action list.

chatHistory.title: Chat with History
chatHistory.desc: Ask the AI questions about a client's full history — across sessions, over time.

agentConfig.title: AI Agent Config
agentConfig.desc: Enter a custom system prompt to fine-tune AI behavior to your specific advisory practice.

followUp.title: Follow-up Questions
followUp.desc: AI suggests smart follow-up questions for the next meeting based on the current session content.

voiceRecording.title: Voice Recording
voiceRecording.desc: Record advisory sessions directly from the browser with a built-in microphone — no external equipment needed.

privacyAudio.title: Privacy-First Audio
privacyAudio.desc: Recordings are processed in-memory only and permanently deleted. No audio file is ever stored on disk.

audioPlayer.title: Audio Player
audioPlayer.desc: Listen back to session recordings directly from the session board whenever needed.

clientManagement.title: Client Management
clientManagement.desc: A central interface to manage all clients, track sessions, and view relationship status.

clientHealth.title: Client Health Pulse
clientHealth.desc: Automatic sentiment analysis and health scoring per client — early detection of at-risk clients.

clientProfile.title: Client Profile
clientProfile.desc: In-depth profile page per client with full session history, tasks, and trends over time.

taskReminders.title: Task Reminders
taskReminders.desc: Send reminders directly to clients about open tasks via automated email.

sessionBoard.title: Session Board
sessionBoard.desc: A unique Kanban board per session with task management, AI summary, and share capabilities.

calendar.title: Calendar Integration
calendar.desc: AI automatically suggests follow-up meetings with direct add-to-calendar functionality.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.desc: Charts and metrics for session frequency, task completion, and advisor-to-client speaking ratios.

taskCenter.title: Task Center
taskCenter.desc: A unified view of all open tasks across all sessions — never miss an action item.

csvExport.title: CSV Export
csvExport.desc: Export analytics data to CSV for deep analysis in external tools.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language
multiLanguage.desc: Full UI in Hebrew, English, and Russian with RTL and LTR support — suited for any audience.

realtimeSync.title: Real-time Sync
realtimeSync.desc: Live updates via Supabase Realtime — changes appear instantly across all devices.

accessibility.title: Advanced Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Built-in accessibility widget: font size, high contrast, grayscale, stop animations, and more.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.desc: Full dark mode with cross-session persistence — easy on the eyes at any hour.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.desc: Quickly navigate the entire app with a keystroke — smart search across all resources.
